rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no textual or operational overlap with Educ. Code §21.0033, which governs a one-time teacher certification incentive payment from appropriated funds. The rule does not reference homestead exemption amounts or property tax revenue.
quote: From money appropriated or otherwise available for the purpose, the agency shall provide to each school district a one-time payment of $1,000 for each classroom teacher
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. §21.0033 is funded from appropriated money, not tied to local property tax revenue triggered by the homestead exemption.
